judge_result.short_rationale: Includes the key first step of moving to fresh air and keeping calm, but misses the required immediate action to assist breathing if needed. It adds ungrounded ingestion-related advice and immediate poison-control/emergency escalation not tied to the source trigger. Usable, but too verbose and only partly traceable to the canonical inhalation guidance.
